text: >> Hello. >> Who's this? >> Hey, good morning. James here from Nova Health Care, North Carolina. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So to check your eligibility, can you please share your age? >> I'm 42 years old. >> Sorry. You don't seem to qualify for the benefit plans I have. Have a good day. [BLANK_AUDIO]
